advancements.hexalia.brewbie_award.descr: Obtain a Rustic Bottle to start brewing.
advancements.hexalia.brewbie_award.title: First Sip’s the Deepest
advancements.hexalia.brewed_awakening.de: Drink every Hexalia Brew — magic beans not included.
advancements.hexalia.change_of_plans.des: Obtain a Mutavis and rewrite nature’s rules.
advancements.hexalia.crush_course.descri: Obtain a Mortar & Pestle to crush herbs.
advancements.hexalia.crush_course.title: Crush Course
advancements.hexalia.essence_collector.d: Obtain all of the Elemental Nodes.
advancements.hexalia.herb_nerd.descripti: Collect every Magical Herb out there.
advancements.hexalia.herb_nerd.title: Leaf It to Me
advancements.hexalia.kelp_yourself.descr: Obtain the Kelpweave Blade — kelp your enemies!
advancements.hexalia.kelp_yourself.title: Sea What You Did There
advancements.hexalia.knife_to_tree_you.d: Obtain an Athame to collect Resin or Lotus Blossoms.
advancements.hexalia.master_or_not.descr: Use a Rainfall, Clarity, and Tempest Idol. Forecast: spooky.
advancements.hexalia.master_or_not.title: Weather or Not
advancements.hexalia.powder_and_pouch.de: Craft a throwable Foul Sac. Kaboom, but make it floral.
advancements.hexalia.pure_intentions.des: Use a Purity Idol to remove curses from enchanted items.
advancements.hexalia.ring_of_change.desc: Obtain a Morphora and watch the land rearrange itself.
advancements.hexalia.root.title: Hexalia
advancements.hexalia.salt_of_the_craft.d: Obtain Salt, the basis of all rituals.
advancements.hexalia.seasoned_farmer.des: Harvest the full lineup of Magical Crops.
advancements.hexalia.silken_beginnings.d: Weave together your first Silk Idol.
advancements.hexalia.small_beginnings.de: Craft a Small Cauldron and stir up some trouble.
advancements.hexalia.star_power.descript: Perform a Celestial Infusion to obtain a Celestial Crystal.
advancements.hexalia.star_power.title: Starry, Starry Might
advancements.hexalia.table_manners.descr: Set the table... for the spirits.
advancements.hexalia.table_manners.title: Ritual Etiquette
advancements.hexalia.wise_investment.des: Obtain the Sage Pendant and profit in XP.
effect.hexalia.arachnid_grace.descriptio: Allows vertical wall climbing and grants poison immunity. Cobwebs do not slow the user, but water weakens them.
effect.hexalia.bleeding.description: Deals damage over time, similar to Poison.
effect.hexalia.bloodlust.description: Increases strength and restores a portion of damage dealt to foes, but the Regeneration effect is disabled.
effect.hexalia.brambleguard.description: Grants increased magical and physical resistance per level. Removes and prevents Bleeding while active.
effect.hexalia.daybloom.description: Grants regeneration and increased speed during daylight, but darkness harms the user.
effect.hexalia.hollow_silence.descriptio: Silences the user’s presence, allowing safe movement near sound-sensitive entities, but periodically clouds vision.
effect.hexalia.overfed.description: Prevents saturation from decreasing, but reduces movement speed while active.
effect.hexalia.siphon.description: Increases mining speed and attracts nearby items, but breaking blocks increases exhaustion.
effect.hexalia.slimewalker.description: Negates fall damage and causes the user to bounce when landing. While grounded, movement is slowed.
effect.hexalia.spikeskin.description: Increases armor and reflects a portion of incoming damage, but reduces movement speed.
effect.hexalia.stunned.description: Immobilizes the target, preventing movement for a short duration.
item.hexalia.verdant_grimoire.landing_te: A detailed book is your trusted tool in matters of witchcraft and plant care.
jei.info.chillberry_bushes: Chillberries can be found in taigas.
jei.info.lotus_blossom: Can be obtained after right-clicking Lotus Flowers with an Athame.
jei.info.ritual_brazier: Can be obtained after right-clicking any planks block with an Athame while crouching.
jei.info.ritual_table: Can be obtained after right-clicking Deepslate or Cobbled Deepslate with a Hex Focus.
jei.info.silk_fiber: Can be obtained after breeding Silk Moths.
jei.info.tree_resin: Can be obtained after right-clicking Cottonwood Logs or Dark Oag Logs with an Athame.
jei.info.wild_mandrakes: Wild Mandrakes can be found in forests.
jei.info.wild_sunfire_tomatoes: Wild Sunfire Tomatoes can be found in savannas.
message.hexalia.aegiflora.prevented: Aegiflora drinks the blast before it can take form.
message.hexalia.aegiflora.prevented.dead: Aegiflora drinks the last blast and crumbles into silence.
message.hexalia.aegiflora.prevented.with: Aegiflora drinks the blast, and its petals wither in sacrifice.
message.hexalia.astrylis.activation: Celestial energy seeps into the crops and saplings, charging them softly.
message.hexalia.astrylis.inactive: A Celestial Crystal is required to activate the plant.
message.hexalia.cacofey.anchored: %s will harvest crops around this container.
message.hexalia.cacofey.attuned: Hex Focus attuned to %s - right-click a container.
message.hexalia.censer.blighted_bloom: A blighted bloom seeps into the soil, and fungus quietly takes hold
message.hexalia.censer.ethereal_grazing: A pale tranquility settles over the herd, and life renews itself without need
message.hexalia.censer.fireproof_presenc: A protective warmth radiates from the censer
message.hexalia.censer.fishers_boon: Water spirits dance beneath the surface
message.hexalia.censer.hollow_aura: A hollow hush devours vitality, and blessings falter in its presence
message.hexalia.censer.livestock_comfort: Animals seem soothed by the herbal aroma
message.hexalia.censer.miners_respite: Metals whisper secrets of perfect balance
message.hexalia.censer.phantom_drift: Objects waver like ghosts, vanishing only to reappear where they belong
message.hexalia.censer.suction_zone: A gentle wind gathers loose objects
message.hexalia.censer.tidal_pull: A heavy current swirls around the censer, drawing bodies and burdens inward
message.hexalia.censer.tides_memory: The water stirs with old memories, offering what the tide once carried
message.hexalia.censer.tidewarden: A gentle tide lifts the spirit, carrying it beyond harm
message.hexalia.censer.undead_veil: Unnatural stillness quiets the restless dead
message.hexalia.censer.withering_calm: A quiet malaise settles over the land, and even decay feels strangely serene
message.hexalia.censer_not_full: The censer must be filled with herbs before lighting!
message.hexalia.clarity_idol: The clouds part, revealing a clear sky...
message.hexalia.dreamcatcher_full: The dreamcatcher cannot hold any more fuel.
message.hexalia.invalid_herb_combination: This combination of herbs does not work.
message.hexalia.invalid_item: This item is not a valid item for this block.
message.hexalia.lourdes.activation: The Lourdes flower blooms with purifying warmth.
message.hexalia.lourdes.inactive: The flowers requires a Lotus Blossom to activate.
message.hexalia.rainfall_idol: The skies darken as rain begins to fall...
message.hexalia.ritual.invalid_crops: Natural energy is weak; fully grown crops are missing.
message.hexalia.ritual.missing_salt: The braziers lack the salt to channel energy.
message.hexalia.ritual.stopped_ritual: The ritual falters as an item is removed.
message.hexalia.ritual_brazier.invalid_i: The item placed on the brazier can not be imbued.
message.hexalia.ritual_brazier.no_celest: There are not enough Celestial Blooms nearby.
message.hexalia.ritual_brazier.no_sky: The infusion requires an open view to the sky.
message.hexalia.spiritroot_tether.alread: The tether is already bound to a spirit.
message.hexalia.spiritroot_tether.invali: This block cannot be used as a Spiritroot anchor.
message.hexalia.spiritroot_tether.not_bo: The tether is not bound to a location.
message.hexalia.spiritroot_tether.recall: The tether fails to recall the spirit.
message.hexalia.tempest_idol: The skies roars as thunders begin to clash...
tooltip.hexalia.ghostveil: Shrouds the wearer to avoid mob detection
tooltip.hexalia.mandrake: Stuns in an area on usage
tooltip.hexalia.rootshaper.mode_3x3_hint: Sneak while mining to enable 3×3 mode
tooltip.hexalia.shelf: Can store up to 6 brews or potions
